mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, sq.* FROM ( SELECT j.jno, j.cid, j.title, j.content, j.deadline, c.cname FROM job j JOIN company c ON j.cid = c.cid
j.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
c.cname LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
TO_CHAR(j.deadline, 'YYYY-MM-DD') LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY
c.cname j.title j.deadline j.jno
ASC DESC
) sq ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= #{offset} + #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job j JOIN company c ON j.cid = c.cid
j.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
c.cname LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
j.deadline >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND j.deadline <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job WHERE cid = #{cid}
SELECT j.*, c.cname FROM job j JOIN company c ON j.cid = c.cid WHERE j.jno = #{jno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job (jno, cid, title, content, deadline) VALUES (seq_job.NEXTVAL, #{cid}, #{title}, #{content}, #{deadline})
